DEFENDANT ISAIAS GOMEZ' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-617462, CGC-24-621099 WITH CASE CGC-24-615691.

The unopposed motion to consolidate this case, Thorpe v. I Gomez Trucking, Inc., CGC-24-615691, with Luttjohoann v. I Gomez Trucking, Inc., CGC-24-617462, and with Weller v. I Gomez Trucking, Inc., CGC-24-621099, is granted. Thorpe will be the lead case. The parties must address any requests to vacate trial dates to Department 206.

Order signed.
